roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOT BAIL HRG & ORD REL ON O/R OR BAIL RED OR ON GPS MONITOR FILED
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MO PC 1385:IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE/CTORD:THATTHE GPS DEVICE BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT/CTORD:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANTS DISCHARGED/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:ANTHONY TALLARICO, SFPD/WIT SWORN:CULLEN ROCHE, SFPD/EXHMA:PEO 1, 2 & 3) PHOTOS/X:THE PEOPLE SUFFER A FIRST DISMISSAL, BUT COUNSEL STIPULATE TO AN IMMEDIATE REFILE AND REARRAIGNMENT ON THE SAME COMPLAINT AND CHARGES PURSUANT TO 1387,2PC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:04-22-19/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANTIS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2:745 HYDE ST,, SF/

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION FOR RELEASE FROM CUSTODY/MO GRTD/ACM/X:AS A CONDITIONOF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THESHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATEDPICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/LD:04-09-19/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:04-09-19/987,2/BAIL:50,000/SA2:745 HYDE STREET, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
